---
title: "SCVCS: Safe-and-Sustainable-by-Design (SSbD) Chips Value Chain Services"
subtitle: "EU-ASEAN Research Initiative for Sustainable Semiconductor Manufacturing"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-container .scvcs-background .welcome}
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-7 .welcome-text .sand-background style="padding: 30px; border-radius: 8px;"}

## 📢 Open Call for Research & Industrial Collaboration

The **SCVCS initiative** is establishing a pioneering **Atoms-to-Law** framework to operationalize a Regenerative Socio-Technical (RST) roadmap for the global semiconductor industry. We are actively seeking to expand our international consortium for upcoming funding tracks.

> ### 🤝 Consortium Expansion Targets:
> * **2–3 EU/UK Partners:** Specializing in advanced physical metrology, confidential computing (TEEs), or ecological economics.
> * **1–2 ASEAN Partners:** Semiconductor manufacturing facilities, packaging/testing hubs, or regional Global Business Services (GBS 5.0) networks.

We bridge the gap between advanced manufacturing physics and absolute sustainability metrics by turning compliance into an automated, data-sovereign manufacturing service.

[Button: Download Consortium Briefing Pack](project.pdf){.btn .btn-primary} 
[[Learn More About the Project Approach →](project.qmd)]{.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-5 style="padding: 20px;"}

### The SCVCS Pillars (System of Systems)

::: {.feature-box style="background: #E8F4F8; padding: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #0078D4; margin-bottom: 15px;"}
🔬 **RealSoS (Physical Metrology & Cybernetics)**
Multi-rate data streams executing SIPAEA loops for real-time yield & emission footprint balancing.
:::

::: {.feature-box style="background: #FFF4E6; padding: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #F0AD4E; margin-bottom: 15px;"}
🛡️ **GuardSoS (Governance & Security)**
Hardware-rooted Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) ensuring data sovereignty and Policy-as-Code.
:::

::: {.feature-box style="background: #E8F5E9; padding: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #28A745; margin-bottom: 15px;"}
♻️ **AuditSoS (Financial & Supply Chain Innovation)**
Regeneratively accountable Scope 3 footprints translated into certified Digital Product Passports (DPP).
:::

:::
:::
:::

---

## Strategic Value Proposition

Instead of static paper disclosures and retrospective annual audits, the SCVCS infrastructure delivers an integrated Atoms-to-Law pipeline:

* **Automated, inline compliance** integrated directly at advanced production stages.
* **Hardware-secured autonomous governance** running validation without exposing trade secrets or factory yield telemetry.
* **Cross-border data sovereignty** mapping smoothly across GDPR, CSDDD, REACH, and CBAM frameworks.
* **Fundable asset tokenization** matching real-time metrology straight to green finance options.

---

## How to Participate

We are co-designing pilot deployments across the critical EU-Hsinchu-Penang manufacturing axis. If your organization fits one of our target pillars, let's connect:

* **Pilot Line Operators:** Validate compliance automation tools in live or simulated fabrication environments.
* **RegTech & Cryptography Labs:** Co-develop Policy-as-Code compilers and secure data-space connectors.
* **GBS & Supply Chain Network Leads:** Map transnational logistics and lead regional talent upskilling initiatives.

**[Explore Technical Work Packages →](project.qmd)** | **[View Proposal Draft (Part B) →](Part.B.qmd)** | **[Get in Touch / Express Interest →](contact.qmd)**
